text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 98 

DRG_OUTLIER_AMT 

LABEL: DRG Outlier Additional Payment Amount 

DESCRIPTION: The additional payment on a claim that is associated with either a cost outlier or length of stay outlier. 

SHORT NAME: DRG_OUTLIER_AMT 

LONG NAME: DRG_OUTLIER_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 

VALUES: Dollar amount with two decimal places
